findings.problem: The same balancing formula migrates across speakers: Lale gets two near-identical versions of the line, then Nami closes a later argument with the same abstract construction. That weakens idiolect separation at exactly the point the style bible wants Lale's measured clause logic to stay distinct from Nami's sensory, literal eeriness.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:91 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:309, keep at most one version of Lale's balancing rejoinder. At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:469, replace Nami's abstract mediator line with language rooted in her own body-and-omen register so the beat lands as Nami rather than as a reusable family placeholder.
findings.acceptance_test: Across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:309, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:469, no more than one line uses the 'both can be true / it can be both' construction, and Nami's replacement line contains a concrete sensory or bodily image that could only belong to her voice.

findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly exits immediate scene pressure to deliver polished Reedmouth theses ('official in Reedmouth...', 'That was the trick of this place', 'Money in Reedmouth...', 'Marrow Market understood debt...'). Once or twice this works; at this frequency it becomes a prose formula, smoothing the chapter's comic-humiliating roughness into authorial captioning.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:67, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:401, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:473 so at least three of those generalizing sentences become scene-bound observation, action, or body-state attached to a specific person, object, or physical pressure already present in the moment. Keep no more than one town-sized thesis sentence per scene.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:67, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:401, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:473, at least three cited passages stay anchored to a visible market detail or Iven's body instead of summarizing Reedmouth as a whole, and no scene contains more than one generalized 'Reedmouth/Marrow Market is X' sentence.

summary: The chapter lands its comic-escalation spine: Iven's monetizing scheme draws the crowd, the corpse-jam turns grotesque without sanitization, and the aftermath converts humiliation into fresh debt and a real authority shift away from Riva. Continuity, tense, and causal sequence hold. It misses pass level on dialogue and prose because one balancing line is reused across distinct speakers and the narration leans too often on polished Reedmouth maxims instead of staying inside Iven's immediate pressure.
